title: Rich Algerian Soya Bean Stir-fry
description: A rich and dense brunch-mood dish featuring dairy-free soya beans, cooked in a flavorful sauce that is both aromatic and filling.

ingredients.name: 2 cups soya beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse the black-eyed peas and soak them in water overnight.
Drain and rinse the soya beans, then add them with the soaked black-eyed peas to a pot. Cover with water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until tender, about 30 minutes.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions, garlic, red pepper, and green bell pepper; cook for 2-3 minutes or until the vegetables start to soften.

Stir in tomato paste and cook for another minute. Add black-eyed peas and soya beans along with their soaking water to the pan. Pour in lemon juice, oregano, salt, and pepper. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve warm as a side dish or main course with crusty bread.
